scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run sync && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,docs -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run dev" "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-docs run dev"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-test run test
scripts.test:quick: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-test run test:quick
scripts.test:lib: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run test
scripts.test:system: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/cli run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/cli run eslint:txt && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n cli,app -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/cli run test" "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-app run test"
